cross_scene_arcs.title: Marital Support Through Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John's relationship with Lara shifts from escalating dinner arguments to providing emotional and practical support during her incarceration, culminating in their joint escape and shared realization of being fugitives.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: John eggs on Erit, provoking Lara and revealing marital tension.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: John and Lara are together in a hotel room, aware they cannot hide.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing flight and threat of capture for the family.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Planning and Executing Escape
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John educates himself on prison escapes, plans police response times, attempts lock-picking, resorts to violence and arson, and successfully escapes with Lara using force.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: John interviews Damon about prison escape strategies for a course on freedom.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: John and Lara have escaped a train and reached a parking lot.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The escape is temporary, with continued pursuit likely.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Incarceration and Confession
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lara progresses from discovering blood on her hands to arrest, conviction, hospitalization after a suicide attempt, and finally confessing the murder to John.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her future incarceration and potential legal appeals.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Marriage Breakdown with John
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lara's relationship with John strains after the verdict, briefly reconnects during her hospitalization, shatters upon her confession, and turns adversarial during an escape attempt.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether their relationship can recover after the confession and escape.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Painful Bond with Son Luke
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lara asks John to stop bringing Luke to prison visits due to emotional pain, is forced to declare abandonment during escape, but experiences a moment of joy when Luke kisses her.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term impact on her relationship with Luke.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Path to Murder Confession
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lara unwittingly handles evidence at the crime scene, discovers blood, is arrested, and later confesses to the murder.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How the confession affects her legal case and John's actions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Coerced Escape and Family Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John forces Lara into an escape plan involving armed confrontation, coerced communication with their son, and complications at the airport where Luke is detained.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the escape and Luke's safety.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Father-Son Bond Through Adversity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Luke's relationship with John evolves from witnessing parental conflict to sharing comfort, approval, and imitation, culminating in John entrusting Luke to others.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Exposed to custody argument between parents.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Left at a birthday party by John, under Nicole's care.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: John's potential absence or lateness, as indicated by leaving contact information.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Estrangement from Mother Lara
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Luke becomes increasingly detached from his incarcerated mother Lara, leading her to consider ending prison visits.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hears father accuse mother of abandonment during custody argument.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lara requests John to stop bringing Luke to visits due to his detachment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Fear that Luke may forget his mother and the bond may weaken further.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Episodes of Fear and Separation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Luke experiences fear during a police raid at home and later separation from parents at airport security.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Frightened and crying when police search his home.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Placed in a glass isolation booth after triggering a metal detector at the airport.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing instability and lack of safety in his environment.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Learning Conflict Responses
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Luke defends his mother with violence, approved by John, but later accepts John's non-violent response to an injury.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hits another child for insulting his mother and receives John's approval.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reassures John after he admits to not hitting back, showing acceptance of non-violence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Developing understanding of when violence is appropriate or not.
